Download

Disable permanantly

Issue Description

Search engine crawlers are unable to access important pages because they are restricted in the robots.txt file. This prevents the pages from being crawled and indexed.

How to fix

Remove or modify disallow rules that block important URLs. Ensure critical pages are allowed for crawling, then test the URLs in Google Search Console and request reindexing.
